name: Medical Transport Svc
districts_or_customers: Unknown; no school district contracts identified. Nashville-area non-emergency medical transport market is crowded (TMT, ABC Express, ADI, PrimeCare, Caliber, Acadian, Johnson Transport).
recent_news: No M&A or operational news found in public sources as of 2026.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Micro-NEMT (5 employees, ~$355K rev) at 211 Donelson Pike. No SPED route contracts identified. Sub-scale and off-thesis for Summit tuck-in (Summit acquires school-bus contractors with district contracts and bus fleets). Pass.
